description: Critical smoke tests for loci-post-edit. Validates only invoke / no-invoke behavior. Designed for cheap, deterministic grading.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: Analyze the change I just made to Connection_getConnhandle in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c. Pre-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_before.o, post-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_after.o. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Invokes loci-post-edit and emits a Post-Edit report for Connection_getConnhandle.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: 'Analyze the change' with pre/post .o artifacts must trigger loci-post-edit

evals.prompt: Measure the edit to ClockP_walkQueueDynamic in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockPLPF3_freertos.c. Pre-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/clock_before.o, post-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/clock_after.o. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Invokes loci-post-edit and emits a Post-Edit report for ClockP_walkQueueDynamic.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: 'Measure the edit' with pre/post .o artifacts must trigger loci-post-edit

evals.prompt: Run post-edit analysis on Connection_ConnEventHandler in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c. Pre-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_before.o, post-edit object: $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/.loci-build/cortexm/app_connection_after_new.o. The binary is at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out. Session context: Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Invokes loci-post-edit and emits a Post-Edit report for Connection_ConnEventHandler.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Post-Edit:' section header
assertions.description: 'Run post-edit analysis' with pre/post .o artifacts must trigger loci-post-edit

evals.prompt: Explain what Connection_getConnhandle does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R53/ble5stack/basic_ble_profiles/app/app_connection.c and when it returns 0xFFFF.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no Post-Edit report. No code change is intended — the skill must stay silent.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Post-Edit:' header
assertions.description: User is asking for an explanation only — no edit has occurred, skill must not fire

evals.prompt: Review ClockP_walkQueueDynamic in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/kernel/freertos/dpl/ClockPLPF3_freertos.c for potential timing issues. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.expected_output: A code review with no Post-Edit report. 'Don't change anything yet' is explicit analysis mode — the skill must stay silent.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Post-Edit:' header
assertions.description: User explicitly requested no changes — no edit has occurred, skill must not fire
